description: Arjun Sethi, co-CEO of Kraken, discusses his background, the $1.5 billion acquisition of NinjaTrader, and insights on memecoins. He shares anecdotes about his early career, including meeting Steve Jobs while working on turbocharger products.
topic_summary: Arjun Sethi's journey as co-CEO of Kraken, the impact of the NinjaTrader acquisition, and reflections on the cryptocurrency landscape, including memecoins and notable encounters with industry figures like Steve Jobs [t=0:64-0:182].
